document.name: Tutu School Long Island City
document.shortDescription: Story-driven ballet classes in Long Island City for children ages 6 months to 8 years.
document.longDescription:
Tutu School Long Island City offers story-driven ballet classes for children ages 6 months to 8 years. The official home page lists four divisions: Baby Ballet for 6–18 months, Tutu Toddlers for 18 months to 3 years, Exploring Ballet for ages 3–5, and Primary Ballet Prep for ages 5–8.

The official classes page says registration is ongoing and that class membership is charged in installment payments of $165 on the 1st of each month, while Baby Ballet tuition is $120 each month. That same page shows classes scheduled across weekdays and weekends, with examples including weekday morning, afternoon, and after-school slots as well as Saturday and Sunday classes.

The official site lists the studio at 43-44 12th Street, Long Island City, NY 11101. This listing uses the general membership figure as a planning price and notes the Baby Ballet tuition difference as an official exception.

Sources: https://tutuschool.com/lic/ https://tutuschool.com/lic/classes/ https://tutuschool.com/lic/wp-content/uploads/sites/27/2025/03/hero-classes-scaled.jpg
document.announcementTitle: Class schedule posted across weekdays and weekends
document.announcementDescription: Official schedule shows morning, afternoon, after-school, and weekend ballet classes.
